title: The Immortal Committer
tagline: A headstone whose star count keeps rising while you stand there.
holy_shit: The person is gone, but the number on their headstone keeps rising while you stand there — the world is still forking their work, computed live in your own phone.
powered_by: /track extract cell on the GitHub API, hash-verified and rendered entirely in the scanner's browser
agent_scenario: When you need a permanent physical marker that renders a live, ever-updating public number with no server to maintain.
author: kody-w + Claude
